message:
chore(repo): broaden .gitignore coverage and add README hero illustration

Expand .gitignore to cover the full artifacts/ directory instead of a
single subdirectory, and add standard OS/editor/environment ignores
(.DS_Store, .idea/, .vscode/, .env, vim swap files). Add a centered
WebP banner illustration to the top of README.md for visual identity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,13 +12,21 @@ legacy_redis_code/
 crates/*/.git/
 crates/*/.git.nested_backup/
 
-# Generated performance/repro artifacts
+# Generated artifacts and benchmark outputs
+artifacts/
 baselines/
 golden_outputs/
 golden_checksums.txt
-artifacts/optimization/phase2c-gate/bench_packets/
 
-# Local scratch/runtime files
+# OS/editor/env/scratch files
+.DS_Store
+._*
+.idea/
+.vscode/
+.env
+.env.*
+*.swp
+*.swo
 *.out
 *.log
 *.tmp

@@ -1,5 +1,9 @@ # FrankenRedis +
+ +
+ FrankenRedis is a clean-room Rust reimplementation targeting grand-scope excellence: semantic fidelity, mathematical rigor, operational safety, and profile-proven performance. ## What Makes This Project Special
